Package org.springdoc.core.service

Class AbstractRequestService

java.lang.Object
org.springdoc.core.service.AbstractRequestService
public abstract class AbstractRequestService extends Object
The type Abstract request builder.

bnasslahsen

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractRequestService

      protected AbstractRequestService(GenericParameterService parameterBuilder, RequestBodyService requestBodyService, SpringDocCustomizers springDocCustomizers, SpringDocParameterNameDiscoverer localSpringDocParameterNameDiscoverer, MethodParameterPojoExtractor methodParameterPojoExtractor)
      Instantiates a new Abstract request builder.
      Parameters:
      parameterBuilder - the parameter builder
      requestBodyService - the request body builder
      springDocCustomizers - the spring doc customizers
      localSpringDocParameterNameDiscoverer - the local spring doc parameter name discoverer
      methodParameterPojoExtractor - the method parameter pojo extractor
